title: AIF is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: AIF is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
AIF invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AIF:
AIF is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF!
